SEARCH
Package battleship

Class GameReportPDF

java.lang.Object
battleship.GameReportPDF
public class GameReportPDF extends Object
Utility class responsible for generating a PDF report at the end of a Battleship game.

The report is automatically created when the game ends and includes:

  • Game title and date/time of the session
  • Overall game statistics (total moves, hits, sunk ships, total duration, etc.)
  • A detailed log of every move played
  • The final state of the board

The output file is saved to the data/ directory with a timestamp-based filename, e.g. data/relatorio_20260318_1430.pdf.

This class uses the OpenPDF library (version 1.3.32) for PDF generation.

Version:
1.0
Author:
[o teu nome]

  • Constructor Details

    • GameReportPDF

      public GameReportPDF()

  • Method Details

    • generate

      public static String generate(Game game, String totalDuration)
      Generates a PDF report for the given completed game and saves it to the data/ directory.

      The report includes the game statistics (including total duration), a move-by-move log, and the final board state. If the output directory does not exist, it is created automatically. If an error occurs during generation, a message is printed to stderr and the method returns the intended filename regardless.

      Parameters:
      game - the completed Game instance to report on; must not be null
      totalDuration - a human-readable string representing the total duration of the game (e.g. "2m 36s 469ms"), as produced by GameTimer.formatDuration(org.joda.time.Duration)
      Returns:
      the path of the generated PDF file (e.g. data/relatorio_20260318_1430.pdf)
